subject: chore: increase batch size to 25 and update workflow
body:
- Change BATCH_SIZE from 10 to 25 in pending.js and extract.js
- Update playbook with new batch size and commit workflow
- New commands: "approve" (no commit), "approve and commit", "commit"
- Reduces model-pear from 24 batches to 10 batches

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
title: increase batch size to 25 and update workflow
